response.global_analysis: Speech features a mix of English, Indonesian, and Japanese as Kobo Kanaeru presents her 2025 birthday merchandise. Verified that the audio phonetically matches the Japanese summary and the intro of 'Sweet Memories'. On-screen text for product names and song credits used for accuracy. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio bursts.

subtitles.original: Princess...
subtitles.english: Princess...

subtitles.original:
I've wanted to wear a jellyfish costume
for a long time.
subtitles.english:
I've wanted to wear a jellyfish costume
for a long time.

subtitles.original:
And finally, my wish came true.
So, how is it, guys?
subtitles.english:
And finally, my wish came true.
So, how is it, guys?

subtitles.original: Do I look beautiful? Ni-ni-ni-ni.
subtitles.english: Do I look beautiful? Hehe.

subtitles.original: And the KV is drawn by Scottie sensei.
subtitles.english: And the KV is drawn by Scottie sensei.

subtitles.original: スコッティ先生、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Scottie sensei, thank you!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: And as you wish, guys...
subtitles.english: And as you wish, guys...

subtitles.original: Finally, tada!
subtitles.english: Finally, tada!

subtitles.original: Kobokers' Happi is here!
subtitles.english: Kobokers' Happi is here!

subtitles.original:
Now you guys can be proud Kobokers and perfect
for cheering me during events.
subtitles.english:
Now you guys can be proud Kobokers and perfect
for cheering me during events.

subtitles.original: Keren banget. Happi, Happi, Happi.
subtitles.english: It's so cool. Happi, Happi, Happi.

subtitles.original: Come on buy Happi, Happi, Happi.
subtitles.english: Come on buy Happi, Happi, Happi.

subtitles.original:
And if you look closely, this Happi design is like
my raincoat, right?
subtitles.english:
And if you look closely, this Happi design is like
my raincoat, right?

subtitles.original:
And you can see there's chills in the front and me
in the back. Right?
subtitles.english:
And you can see there's chills in the front and me
in the back. Right?

subtitles.original: And next!
subtitles.english: And next!

subtitles.original:
We have this "Jellyfish Princess on the Wall"
Tapestry.
subtitles.english:
We have this "Jellyfish Princess on the Wall"
Tapestry.

subtitles.original:
It's printed with my brand new birthday
illustration.
subtitles.english:
It's printed with my brand new birthday
illustration.

subtitles.original:
It's super high quality and perfect for
decorating your wall.
subtitles.english:
It's super high quality and perfect for
decorating your wall.

subtitles.original:
You can wake up and see Kobo's smug face
every morning.
subtitles.english:
You can wake up and see Kobo's smug face
every morning.

subtitles.original:
And also don't forget to praise the Lord
every day.
subtitles.english:
And also don't forget to praise the Lord
every day.

subtitles.original: Then, look at this!
subtitles.english: Then, look at this!

subtitles.original:
The "Jellyfish Princess, you got this"
Button Badge Set. Two pieces.
subtitles.english:
The "Jellyfish Princess, you got this"
Button Badge Set. Two pieces.

subtitles.original:
One has my birthday outfit and the other is an
illustration I drew by myself.
subtitles.english:
One has my birthday outfit and the other is an
illustration I drew by myself.

subtitles.original: Yeah, by myself. It looks good, right?
subtitles.english: Yeah, by myself. It looks good, right?

subtitles.original: Do you like it? I drew it by myself.
subtitles.english: Do you like it? I drew it by myself.

subtitles.original:
So you can pin them to your bag, or your hat,
or your heart.
subtitles.english:
So you can pin them to your bag, or your hat,
or your heart.

subtitles.original: This one is one of my favorites.
subtitles.english: This one is one of my favorites.

subtitles.original: One, two, three... tada!
subtitles.english: One, two, three... tada!

subtitles.original: The Plushie Keychain!
subtitles.english: The Plushie Keychain!

subtitles.original: It's me, but mini Kobo in mini form.
subtitles.english: It's me, but mini Kobo in mini form.

subtitles.original:
You can bring me anywhere on your backpack,
your keys...
subtitles.english:
You can bring me anywhere on your backpack,
your keys...

subtitles.original:
...your motorcycle, the car, or whatever, even
next to your computer while you watch my streams.
subtitles.english:
...your motorcycle, the car, or whatever, even
next to your computer while you watch my streams.

subtitles.original: So soft and squishy.
subtitles.english: So soft and squishy.

subtitles.original: And finally...
subtitles.english: And finally...

subtitles.original: We also have the Situational Voice Pack.
subtitles.english: We also have the Situational Voice Pack.

subtitles.original:
So it's called "Your One and Only Jellyfish
Princess". What does it mean?
subtitles.english:
So it's called "Your One and Only Jellyfish
Princess". What does it mean?

subtitles.original: Buy it, buy it okay, so you know what does it mean.
subtitles.english: Buy it, buy it okay, so you know what does it mean.

subtitles.original:
It's a special voice pack where I talk to you
about Jellyfish Princess...
subtitles.english:
It's a special voice pack where I talk to you
about Jellyfish Princess...

subtitles.original: ...and you know, your one and only just for you.
subtitles.english: ...and you know, your one and only just for you.

subtitles.original: Yeah, don't miss out my birthday merch guys.
subtitles.english: Yeah, don't miss out my birthday merch guys.

subtitles.original:
If you buy a set of them, you'll get a special
bromide with my signature on it.
subtitles.english:
If you buy a set of them, you'll get a special
bromide with my signature on it.

subtitles.original:
The merch is available for a limited time only,
so you can grab yours...
subtitles.english:
The merch is available for a limited time only,
so you can grab yours...

subtitles.original:
...from the official shop.
Links are in the description.
subtitles.english:
...from the official shop.
Links are in the description.

subtitles.original: So yeah, that's all for the announcement.
subtitles.english: So yeah, that's all for the announcement.

subtitles.original:
Thank you for coming and watching Kobo
performance today.
subtitles.english:
Thank you for coming and watching Kobo
performance today.

subtitles.original: 以上グッズとお知らせでした。
subtitles.english: That's all for the merchandise and announcements.

subtitles.original: 説明欄やチャット欄にリンクを貼ってありますので、
subtitles.english: Links are in the description and chat section,

subtitles.original: クリックしてね。おーよ！
subtitles.english: so please click them. Oh yeah!

subtitles.original: But I can hear some of you want an encore, hmm?
subtitles.english: But I can hear some of you want an encore, hmm?

subtitles.original: アンコール、アンコールほしい？
subtitles.english: Encore, encore, you want an encore?

subtitles.original: じゃ、しょうがないわ…
subtitles.english: Well, I guess I have no choice...

subtitles.original: Sweet Memories
subtitles.english: Sweet Memories

subtitles.original: あ〜
subtitles.english: Ah~
